'''Gelgelar Outfitters''' was a general store that was located within the [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]]. It was maintained by [[Qulo Ecls]], who owned the venue during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The store was very cluttered, and mostly stocked with items that were needed on Gelgelar such as [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]], water-proof [[Cloak/Legends|cloaks]] and hunting equipment. The clerks at the store love to bargain and the prices were marked up so the negotiations would make the customers think they were getting a bargain. The building was two stories, with the upper level used as a domicile for the Ecls family. Qulo's office was in the back of the lower level, near the landing platforms, so he could get first crack at buying incoming cargos.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''
